name: quid-monorepo
description: Quid Finance App + Aura IA Agent — Monorepo

scripts.postgres:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.postgres.yml up -d postgres
scripts.postgres:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.postgres.yml logs -f postgres
scripts.postgres:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.postgres.yml stop postgres
